title: Assignment_Master — Hackensack PD Personnel Reference
description: Schema for Assignment_Master_V3_FINAL.xlsx / Assignment_Master_V2.csv. Single source of truth for personnel data used by ETL pipelines and Power BI reports.

FULL_NAME.description: Composite display name in format: {TITLE} {FIRST_NAME} {LAST_NAME} {BADGE_NUMBER}. Unbadged personnel omit badge.

TITLE.description: Job title abbreviation (functional role). Distinct from RANK — detectives have TITLE=DET. but RANK=P.O.

BADGE_NUMBER.description: Badge number as text. Blank for unbadged civilian personnel (~10 nulls).

PADDED_BADGE_NUMBER.description: 4-digit zero-padded badge number. '0000' for unbadged personnel. Primary join key for ETL pipelines.
x_validation_rules: Must not be parsed as numeric (leading zeros required).
PEO badges are 4-digit values (2008, 2013, 2025, 2027, 2030) — not zero-padded short numbers.

TEAM.description: Squad-level assignment sourced from POSS_EMPLOYEE. 37 valid values.

WG2.description: Bureau / section-level work group (e.g., PATROL DIVISION, TRAFFIC BUREAU). Primary bureau field used in Power BI summons visuals.
WG2.x_known_typo: RECODS AND EVIDENCE MANAGEMENT — missing R in RECORDS

WG3.description: Sub-unit or role (e.g., PLATOON A, CLASS I).

WG4.description: Squad code — patrol division only. Null for all other assignments.

CONTRACT_TYPE.description: Bargaining unit / employment contract type. Previously named POSS_CONTRACT_TYPE.

STANDARD_NAME.description: Standardized display name for reports: F. LAST #BADGE. Previously named 'Proposed 4-Digit Format'. 20 records flagged REQUIRES_MANUAL_MAPPING.

CONFLICT_RESOLUTION.description: YES/NO flag for name conflict resolution.

CODE.description: Short unique lookup ID: first initial + last initial + badge number (e.g., JA386).

WORKING_GROUP.description: Contract group — often mirrors CONTRACT_TYPE. May be redundant (trim candidate).

DOB.description: Date of birth. Stored as Excel serial number; display format mm/dd/yyyy.

JOINED_SERVICE.description: Service start date. Stored as Excel serial number.

SGT.description: Sergeant promotion date. Null for non-promoted officers (~140 nulls).

LT.description: Lieutenant promotion date. Null for non-promoted officers (~150 nulls).

CAPT.description: Captain promotion date. Null for non-promoted officers (~160 nulls).

CHIEF.description: Chief promotion date. Null for non-promoted officers (~165 nulls).

STATUS.description: Employment status. Currently 1 INACTIVE record (F. LORENZO).

RANK.description: Standardized civil service rank abbreviation. 100% populated (28 blanks filled in V3). Distinct from TITLE — detectives have RANK=P.O. regardless of assignment.

x_version_history.changes: MAJOR: 42→26 cols; renamed cols; flagged STANDARD_NAME
MAJOR: 138 TEAM updates from POSS; 8 CONTRACT_TYPE; 2 name fixes; TC/DESK distinction
28 RANK blanks filled; all RANK standardized; SPECIAL_NOTES deleted
Deleted PQ sheet; renamed sheet/table; saved as V3_FINAL
